mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.user_id AS userId, f.name, f.tunnel_id AS tunnelId, f.remote_addr AS remoteAddr, f.status, f.created_time AS createdTime, f.updated_time AS updatedTime, f.user_name AS userName, f.in_flow AS inFlow, f.strategy AS strategy, f.out_flow AS outFlow, f.inx AS inx, f.group_name AS groupName, t.name AS tunnelName, t.type FROM forward f LEFT JOIN tunnel t ON f.tunnel_id = t.id ORDER BY f.created_time DESC

SELECT f.id, f.user_id AS userId, f.name, f.tunnel_id AS tunnelId, f.remote_addr AS remoteAddr, f.status, f.created_time AS createdTime, f.updated_time AS updatedTime, f.user_name AS userName, f.in_flow AS inFlow, f.out_flow AS outFlow, f.strategy AS strategy, f.inx AS inx, f.group_name AS groupName, t.name AS tunnelName, t.type FROM forward f LEFT JOIN tunnel t ON f.tunnel_id = t.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_time DESC
